series_metadata.series_description: Records related to payment of financial obligations (including employee reimbursements, TMRS credit cards, and outside vendors). Also includes print-outs of posting journal entry batch to the accounts payable module. Also includes supporting documents needed to verify the accuracy of the invoice and to authorize payment. This includes Vendor W-9's.
Receivables due from employees, vendors, and retirees are managed here. Also includes printouts of posted journal entry batch to the accounts receivable module.

Records related to analysis and audit of depository TMRS bank accounts. These records support the monthly account reconciliation process and are used to document reconciliations that developed from that analysis.

series_metadata.series_title: Banking - Account Set-up, Management and Authorized Signatures
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the setup and management of the System's bank depository accounts. Includes bank account numbers and set-up documentation. Records of persons authorized to sign on transactions involving TMRS bank accounts.

Records related to deposits and wire transfers made to and from depository bank accounts. These records are used to verify the transfer and deposit of funds. Includes deposit slips and wire transfer records.

tracking_data.comments:
The virtual remittance deposits from
TMRS to its bank are the official record
of all deposited checks.

series_metadata.series_description: Financial records documenting the purchase, sale, and improvement of real property and equipment, as well as depreciation, amortization, etc. Includes appropriation for expense and fixed assets and work-in-progress.

Records used to transfer charges between accounts and for summarizing account information. Includes entries made to the general ledger to correct coding errors, correct ledger accounts accrued for expenses not yet paid, or other similar activities.

series_metadata.series_title: General Ledger - Year-End Ledgers and Trial Balances
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the general ledger. Includes the actual general ledger that summarizes all corporate accounts.

tracking_data.comments:
Agency Policy to retain longer than
TSLAC Minimum.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to analysis and audit of accounts related to TMRS Plans. These records support the monthly account reconciliation process and are used to document reconciliations that developed from that analysis.
Records related to investment-related cash flows and monthly unallocated cash projections.
Reconciliations and records supporting accounting transactions related to TMRS investments.

Manuals, guidelines, administrative rules, or similar records distributed internally for the use of employees or externally to the public or those individuals or entities regulated by an agency that set out the rules, policies, and procedures that govern an agency's programs, services, or projects. Includes working files and related documentation used in creating rules, policies, and procedures.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Working files and
related documentation used in creating
the final rules, policies, and procedures
are not subject to archival requirement
and may be disposed of at the
expiration of the retention period.

series_metadata.series_description: Documentation supporting the records management program's destruction processing to demonstrate that records were destroyed according to the TMRS retention schedule.

Records that identify transactions to and from off-site storage as well as the indices for records identification and location. Consists of transfer, retrieval, and shipping manifest forms. Excludes destruction authorization forms and reports.

tracking_data.comments:
See ADM2040 for Information
Governance - Records Control Locator
Aids. See ADM2000 for Records
Destruction Certification.

series_metadata.series_title: Information Governance - Records Control Locator Aids
series_metadata.series_description: Records including indices, card files, shelf list, registers, guides, etc., such as the Lason Access data base used to identify where microfiche containing member, retiree, and city records are located.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: These records must carry the
same retention period and archival
code of the records they support.

series_metadata.series_description: A records retention schedule (i.e. form SLR 105) that identifies the records that are created and maintained by an agency provides the minimum timeframes the records must be retained and includes instructions for their disposition. This series may include working files and documentation of certification and approval by the Texas State Library and Archives Commission.

tracking_data.comments:
Original is retained for 50 years by the
State and Local Records Management
Division, Texas State Library and
Archives Commission.

series_metadata.series_description: Administrative correspondence records, both internal and external, related to TMRS policies, programs, directives, and initiatives. Does not include correspondence related to specific System activities, such as Human Resources, Legal, and Member Benefits.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only the
administrative correspondence of
executive staff, board or commission
members, division directors and
program heads require archival review.
Contact the State Archives when these
records have met their retention
periods.
CAUTION: This records series and item
number 1.1.008 should be used only
for correspondence that is not included
in or directly related to another records
series on the agency's approved
schedule.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to primarily internal casual correspondence. This record class is to be used only for correspondence not covered elsewhere. Non-administrative incoming/outgoing and internal correspondence, in any media, pertaining to or arising from the routine operations of the policies, programs, services, or projects of an agency. This includes correspondence with

tracking_data.comments: SEE comment to item number 1.1.007.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting business unit administration, planning, and management activities. Includes business unit work assignments, schedules, presentations, calendars, and other miscellaneous administrative records not covered elsewhere.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only the calendars,
appointment, and itinerary records of
elected officials, agency heads, and
board or commission members require
archival review. Contact the State
Archives when these records have met
their retention periods.
CAUTION: A record of this type
purchased with personal funds, but
used by state official or employee to
document his or her work activities
may be a state record and subject to
this retention period. See Open
Records Decision 635 issued in
December 1995 by the Texas Attorney
General.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to management of internal projects, special studies, analysis, and other department events not covered elsewhere. Includes ad hoc studies performed at the corporate or workgroup level. Includes notes, presentations, reports, studies, project plans, meeting minutes, status reporting, presentations, etc.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Data processing
planning records are not archival.

series_metadata.series_description: Presentations, conference reports, and papers delivered at a conference or meeting in conjunction with TMRS business. May include handouts.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only speeches,
papers, and presentations given by or
on behalf of executive staff, board or
commission members, division
directors and program heads require
archival review.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting TMRS' vehicle ownership and licensing. Records include vehicle titles and registration.

tracking_data.comments: LA = Vehicle is sold or disposed of.

series_metadata.series_title: External Financial Audits - Audit Reports and Work Papers
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the external financial audit of TMRS and its business units. Includes final audit report and working papers including preliminary drafts and supporting documentation for external financial audit final reports.
Records related to complaints made to the Board Audit Committee regarding TMRS and/or employees. Includes complaints and Audit Committee responses.

Records related to individual participating cities that indicate current status within the TMRS systems. Does not include ordinances and city retirement plans, contribution rates, and contribution transactions.

tracking_data.comments:
See CSA1020 for Cities - City
Contributions. See CSA1060 for
Participating Cities - Ordinances and
City Plans.

series_metadata.series_description: City contributions data from participating cities to TMRS. Includes records regarding city payroll information and city contributions deposited into TMRS's bank account. Does not include processing documentation. Excludes checks subject to destruction pursuant to Federal Regulations.

tracking_data.comments:
Relates to City employees information,
not TMRS employees. See Texas
Government Code, §852.110. See
CSA1030 for Cities - Contributions
Processing. The virtual remittance
deposits from TMRS to its bank are the
official record of all deposited checks.

series_metadata.series_description: TMRS records documenting the receipt and processing of city contributions data. Does not include city contributions data transferred to TMRS.

tracking_data.comments: See CSA1020 Cities - City Contributions.

series_metadata.series_title: Participating Cities - Ordinances and City Plans
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting city ordinances regarding employee retirement plans and the plan provisions and changes/potential changes to plans.

series_metadata.series_title: Plan Administration - Rates and Calculation Factors
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting annuity purchase rate factors.
Records documenting city rate information and rate changes, including actuarial valuations; and GASB 68 and GASB75 Employer Reporting Packages including GASB 68/75 Census Data.

tracking_data.comments:
GASB = Governmental Accounting
Standards Board.

series_metadata.series_title: Plan Administration - Special Actuarial Studies, Funding Policies and Rules
series_metadata.series_description: Special actuarial studies, including experience studies, as well as rules, policies and methods needed to calculate contribution rates and provisions of TMRS benefit plans.

tracking_data.comments:
AV to be determined by the Director of
Plan Design and Funding, or other
designee of the Executive Director.

series_metadata.series_title: Plan Administration - New City and Plan Change Studies
series_metadata.series_description: Actuarial cost studies for new cities and plan change requests.

tracking_data.comments:
AV to be determined by the Director of
City Services, or other designee of the
Executive Director.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to appointment, training and termination of TMRS Board of Trustees and Committees.
Records documenting PRB required educational training for the Executive Director or such training for TMRS Trustees that occurs outside of open board meetings.

tracking_data.comments: PRB= Pension Review Board.

series_metadata.series_title: Board of Trustees and Committee Meetings
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting proceedings of the TMRS Board of Trustees, committees of the Board and other legally required meetings. Includes meeting minutes, voting records, and supporting documentation; does not include non-legally required meetings.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Agency retains
permanent record copy.

series_metadata.series_description: Copies of all proposed, withdrawn, emergency, and adopted rules, open meetings notices; or any other documents required by law to be submitted to the Texas Register.
Records documenting the creation, structure, and governance of TMRS includes by-laws, organizational charts, and charters.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only charts showing
the overall arrangement and
administrative structure of the state
agency need to be transferred to the
Archives and Information Services
Division, Texas State Library and
Archives Commission. Organizational
charts showing division/department
level detail are not considered archival.

series_metadata.series_description: Final Approved ACFRs.

Records describing and administering corporate insurance programs that provide coverage for mitigating TMRS liability. Includes policies, minutes, riders, proofs of payment, etc. Includes policies for crime, directors and officers (D & O), EEOC, general liability, property insurance, workers compensation, automobile, business travel, umbrella and access, environmental, errors and omissions (E & O), pollution liability, fiduciary, non-owned air travel, and safe-deposit legal liability. Excludes employees medical and life insurance.

tracking_data.comments:
Includes all polices regardless of
executed, renewed or amended date.

series_metadata.series_title: Strategic and Business Planning Including Performance Measures Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Records that document the strategic and business plans of TMRS and its business units. Includes marketing plans and business plans. Also includes records needed for the documentation of output, outcome, efficiency, and explanatory measures of the strategic plan, and for performance measures used to manage the agency.

tracking_data.comments:
TMRS does not make any
appropriations requests.
ARCHIVES NOTE: The final version of
Strategic Plans must be submitted to
the Texas State Publications Depository
Program per 13 TAC 3.3(a)(2)(C).
Working files and related
documentation used in creating the
final plan are not subject to archival
review and may be disposed of at the
expiration of the retention period.

series_metadata.series_title: Facilities - Maintenance Manual and Technical Reference
series_metadata.series_description: Reference and technical instruction manuals provided by the manufacturer for products and equipment used by TMRS.
Records related to routine security actions taken to protect TMRS employees, equipment, buildings, and information. Includes clearance list and investigations.

Records relating to the issuance of keys, identification cards, building passes and building access cards, passwords, signed statements or similar instruments of access to agency or state facilities, equipment or automated systems.
Logs, registers, or similar records documenting visitors to limited access or restricted areas of agency facilities.

Records related to internal planning and financial management. Includes records of the business income, expenses, and cash flow on a monthly, quarterly, and annual basis. Includes fiscal year budgets for business areas and earnings forecast and analysis. Includes monthly, quarterly, and annual reports summarizing financial budgets and goals. Excludes Annual Comprehensive Financial Reports.

tracking_data.comments:
See EXE1120 for Annual
Comprehensive Financial Reports.

series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the analysis, forecasting, and disposition of TMRS' cash balances. Includes records used to determine actual and future cash balances, as well as records related to analysis of TMRS borrowing strategies, investment strategies, and float trends.

Internal and external periodic fiscal management reports and documents providing useful sales, accounting, financial and other asset information to management. Includes federal financial reports, HUB reports, etc. These records are not part of accounting transaction processing or financial statements functions.

tracking_data.comments:
See INV2000 for investment
performance reports. See HRE1000 for
Salary Reports.

series_metadata.series_description: Financial statements and reports submitted to government agencies. Includes financial statements from all business activity.

tracking_data.comments:
See EXE1120 for Annual ACFRs. TMRS
does not fall under the General
Appropriations Act (100 Day Report).

series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the general management and administration of benefit plans for TMRS employees. Includes plan-related and vendor correspondence and general employee communications relative to benefits, such as open enrollment communications and notices from HR to all TMRS employees.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Benefit Administration - Benefit Plan Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to ERS change reports on general management and administration of employment benefit plans for TMRS employees, including planned and actual deferrals.
Records related to TMRS Deferred Compensation Plan (i.e., 457 plan) only, including contracts, policies, funds selected for plan options and changes to the Plan.

tracking_data.comments: This does not include ERS plans.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Benefit Plan Texts and Amendments
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to TMRS-sponsored benefit plans. Includes insurance, disability, survivor programs, vesting criteria, vacation entitlements, educational systems, and seniority or merit systems. Does not include the TMRS Deferred Compensation Plan, nor the TMRS Pension Plan.

tracking_data.comments:
See HRB1040 for TMRS Deferred
Compensation Plan. See MBA2020 for
TMRS Pension Plan.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting the determination and monitoring of salary structures, incentive programs, job classification and placement, allowances, etc. Includes pay scales, salary surveys, and other salary administration evaluations.

tracking_data.comments:
Agency Policy to retain longer than
TSLAC Minimum.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to internal or external announcements or advertisements of job openings, promotions, training programs or opportunities for overtime.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Recruitment and Selection - Not Hired
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the recruitment of applicants for a particular position within TMRS who were not hired or did not accept the position, including documentation supporting the decision. Includes resumes and applications.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Does not include ADA
Accommodation Request.

series_metadata.series_description: Copies of employee announcements and other informative communications, clarifications and explanations about policies, in-house magazines, special events, civic activities and newsletters.
Records pertaining to relations between TMRS and its employees not covered in other record classes.

Records related to employee's concerns, complaints, and allegations of non-compliance with employer policies (e.g. sexual harassment allegations), general use of employee assistance programs, referrals, and disciplinary records. Includes corrective actions which do not affect pay, status, or tenure and are imposed to correct or improve an employee's job performance.

tracking_data.comments:
If the situation becomes a legal issue, it
migrates to AIN LEG2020 Hearings and
Litigation.
CAUTION: If, during the retention
period of this records series, any part of
this series is used to document and
support personnel disciplinary action
under HRE1520, all documentation
from this series used to support
disciplinary action must be retained for
the minimum retention period
described by HRE1520.

series_metadata.series_title: Employment Eligibility, Documentation or Verification of
series_metadata.series_description: Federal reporting forms (INS I-9)

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Federal regulation requires
that INS 1-9 forms be retained for 3
years from date of hire or 1 year after
separation of the employee, whichever
is later. Agencies should make certain
that the INS I-9 forms for employees
who terminate from an agency less
than 3 years from date of hire are kept
for the 3 year retention period.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting TMRS equal employment policies. Includes reports which TMRS is required to file with the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission identifying the workforce demographics. Also includes records regarding equal pay and documentation used to complete EEO reports.

Records related to general liability and on-the- job accidents as required by OSHA and Texas Worker's Compensation regulations. Includes official OSHA logs as well as required supplementary records related to OSHA reportable injuries and illnesses. Also include related Family Medical Leave (FMLA) documentations, including related employee medical records.
Records related to job descriptions, including summary of position responsibilities, requirements, and reporting relationships.

Records showing TMRS employee names and contact information. Includes any reports compiled by an agency on aspects of personnel staffing, including listings of all staff by program or name, staff hired during a month, detailed listings of employees within its organizational structure, position vacancies, analyses of turnover rates and seasonality of employment, etc.

tracking_data.comments:
US = Purpose of the record has been
fulfilled.

series_metadata.series_description: Records providing a history of employment from initial hiring, including application, applicant testing, promotion, performance appraisals, transfers, etc.

tracking_data.comments:
All TMRS Employment contracts are
under LEG1000.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting specific employee's job performance. Includes reviews and evaluations by supervisors, recommendations for promotions, commendations, and/or compensation, and corrective action plans.

tracking_data.comments:
Agency Policy to retain longer than
TSLAC Minimum.

series_metadata.series_description: Any internally distributed manuals, guidelines, or similar records that define agency wide policies and procedures concerning the personnel of the agency.

Records relating to the development and operation of TMRS-sponsored training programs and seminars. Includes seminars, education assistance, management and supervision development, job progression, drug and alcohol awareness.

Records that document minimum information needed to verify employment. Includes name, social security number, exact dates of employment, last known address, most recent public access option form, and last title or position held.

tracking_data.comments:
See HRE1500 for Personnel Contact
Information. See MBA2020 for
Verification information.

series_metadata.series_title: Time Off and/or Sick Leave Requests
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the request for time off and/or sick leave.

tracking_data.comments:
Includes supporting documents for
FMLA and other types of authorized
leave.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to TMRS' policies, procedures and processes for administering the investment program. Includes the final version of board-approved Investment Policy Statement, Investment Guidelines, Staff Investment Committee Charter.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Working files and
related documentation used in creating
the final rules, policies, and procedures
are not subject to archival requirement
and may be disposed of at the
expiration of the retention period.

series_metadata.series_description: Incoming/outgoing correspondence between Investment staff and internal parties, and external managers, consultants and third party providers.

tracking_data.comments:
If correspondence relates to a
contractual relationship with TMRS, it
will need to be retained in accordance
with LEG1000.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to Investment compliance and manually-run Investment compliance tests.

Records created during day-to-day business activities in support of investment operations. Non-contract records related to ongoing manager and consultant relationships. Records related to deliverables as outlined in manager, consultant, custody and third party service provider agreements, and ad hoc requests. Records related to the planning, forecasting, management, analysis and performance of the portfolio. Records relating to Investment Staff's participation on Limited Partner Advisory Committee (LPAC) Advisory Boards.

tracking_data.comments:
See FIN1220 for reports associated
with investments. See LEG1000 for
investment-related contract records.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the activities of the Staff Investment Committee (SIC).

tracking_data.comments:
This committee is an internal
Investment Department. Staff
committee and not subject to the Open
Meeting Act.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting the development of functionality and architecture for TMRS computer system and applications. Includes business analysis, functional/technical specifications, and quality assurance testing documents.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Hardware and software
needed for access to electronic records
must be retained for the period of time
required to access the records.

series_metadata.series_description: Documentation of plans which would be implemented in the event of a disaster or information systems failure. Includes contact person, backup sites, and instructions for personnel.

tracking_data.comments:
US = Plan is superseded or is no longer
in effect.

series_metadata.series_description: Source code for TMRS-owned software that is either internally or externally developed, and which is used internally by employees.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Software needed for access
to electronic records must be retained
for the period of time required to
access the records.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting operational and maintenance requirements of computer hardware such as operating manuals, hardware/operating system requirements, hardware configurations, equipment control systems, and associated processing files.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Hardware needed for access
to electronic records must be retained
for the period of time required to
access the records.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting the request for and response to help desk tickets reviewed by divisions or units, such as information technology.
Equipment listing showing what IT equipment is currently assigned to which employee such as I-Pads and cell phones. Also shows all IT Servers.
Files needed for electronic data audits. Records include but are not limited to: activity logs, security logs, application logs, error logs, etc.

series_metadata.series_title: Contracts and Agreements - General (Not Real Estate Contracts)
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to obligations under contracts and other agreements between TMRS and outside parties, excluding such records relating to real estate. Includes contracts for services, purchases, sales, transportation, equipment leases and investments. Includes disputes that do not progress to litigation and claims. Note: Although generally open, some contracts and RFPs have limited confidentiality requirements.

tracking_data.comments:
Includes contracts regardless of their
executed, renewed or amended date.
Also includes all employment contracts.
See LEG1020 for Contracts,
Agreements and Leases - Real Estate
Construction, Improvements, Deeds
and Easements. See PUR1000 for Bid
Documentation.

series_metadata.series_title: Contracts, Agreements and Leases - Real Estate Construction, Improvements, Deeds and Easements
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to contracts and agreements for improvements to TMRS-owned real property, including construction agreements. This also includes records related to real estate ownership or lease - deeds, easements, leases, title insurance, including easements granted to 3rd parties permitting access to TMRS property, as well as easements granted to TMRS by outside parties for accessing their property.

tracking_data.comments:
LA = Real Estate/Facility is sold or
disposed of. Includes contracts
regardless of their executed, renewed
or amended date. Does not include
real estate investment contracts, which
are included in LEG1000. TMRS
building is not a state-owned building
or property.

series_metadata.series_title: Court and Government Orders (Non-Member and Non-Litigation)
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to court orders or governmental orders other than: orders regarding specific TMRS members or employees; or, orders entered in litigation proceedings involving TMRS.

tracking_data.comments:
See LEG2000 for Administrative
Hearings, LEG2020 for Non-Investment
Litigation, LEG2040 for Investment
Litigation or MBA2020 for Member
Employees - General, as applicable.
ARCHIVES NOTE: Cases that set legal
precedent or exhibit historical value
will be evaluated by the Archives and
Information Services Division of the
Texas State Library and Archives
Commission for archival preservation.
See page ix of TSLAC's RRS for more
information.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to disputes considered by the Texas State Office of Administrative Hearings. Includes copies of motions, appeals, administrative decisions, case files received from Administrative Law Judges and arbitrators.

tracking_data.comments:
Agency Policy to retain longer than
TSLAC Minimum. ARCHIVES NOTE:
Cases that set legal precedent or
exhibit historical value will be
evaluated by the Archives and
Information Services Division of the
Texas State Library and Archives
Commission for archival preservation.
See page ix of TSLAC's RRS for more
information.

series_metadata.series_title: Hearings and Litigation - Non- Investment or Non-Member Litigation
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to threatened or asserted litigation, other than litigation relating to TMRS investments or specific TMRS members. Includes pleadings, discovery, attorney work products, legal opinions, transcripts, exhibits, final judgments, settlements, court orders, and other documents specifying final terms, conditions and decisions related to claims and litigation.

tracking_data.comments:
See LEG2000 for Administrative
Hearings, LEG2040 for Investment
Litigation, MBA2020 - Member
Employees - General.
Agency Policy to retain longer than
TSLAC Minimum.
ARCHIVES NOTE: Cases that set legal
precedent or exhibit historical value
will be evaluated by the Archives and
Information Services Division of the
Texas State Library and Archives
Commission for archival preservation.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to threatened or asserted litigation relating to TMRS investments. Includes pleadings, discovery, attorney work products, legal opinions, transcripts, exhibits, final judgments, settlements, court orders, and other documents specifying final terms, conditions and decisions related to claims and litigation. Includes U.S. securities litigation in which TMRS is a lead plaintiff and non-U.S. securities litigation. Does NOT include records regarding U.S. securities litigation in which TMRS is a class member but not lead plaintiff.

tracking_data.comments:
LEG2000 for Administrative Hearings,
LEG2020 for Non-Investment or Non-
Member Litigation, or MBA2020 for
Member Employees - General, as
applicable. Agency Policy to retain
longer than TSLAC Minimum.
ARCHIVES NOTE: Cases that set legal
precedent or exhibit historical value
will be evaluated by the Archives and
Information Services Division of the
Texas State Library and Archives
Commission for archival preservation.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting legal opinions generated by TMRS legal counsel, either internal or external, or the Office of Attorney General and relating to TMRS. These opinions involve System members, cities, and open records requests and therefore provide on-going guidance for System operations.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Does not include legal
opinions or advice rendered on a
matter in litigation or with regard to
pending litigation. SEE LEG2000.
ARCHIVES NOTE: Opinions and advice
that set legal precedent or exhibit
historical value will be evaluated by the
Archives and Information Services
Division of the Texas State Library and
Archives Commission for archival
preservation. See pages IX of TSLAC's
Retention Schedule for additional
guidelines.

series_metadata.series_description: Legal research and related work papers for various subjects and projects, such as employee and member matters, insurance consultation for contracts and agreements, etc. Excludes legal opinions or documents relating to specific litigation or setting legal precedent.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Does not include legal
opinions or advice rendered on a
matter in litigation or with regard to
pending litigation, or opinions rendered
for Public Information Act requests.
ARCHIVES NOTE: Opinions and advice
that set legal precedent or exhibit
historical value will be evaluated by the
Archives and Information Services
Division of the TSLAC for Archival
preservation. See pages IX of TSLAC's
Retention Schedule for additional
guidelines.

series_metadata.series_title: Legal Projects and Analysis - Public Information Not Excepted
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting requests for information submitted to TMRS under the Texas Public Information Act for which the request was fulfilled and records were released. Includes TMRS request for an open records decision from Attorney General's Office, if applicable. Does not include open records decisions rendered by Attorney General's Office.

tracking_data.comments:
Agency Policy to retain longer than
TSLAC Minimum.

series_metadata.series_title: Legal Projects and Analysis - Public Information Excepted
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting requests for information submitted to TMRS under the Texas Public Information Act for which the request was not fulfilled (in whole or in part). Includes open records requests denied/not released because the records are not public information as defined by the Public Information Act. Includes TMRS requests for open records decision, if applicable. Does not include open records decision if rendered by the Attorney General's Office.
Records involving legal analysis of State legislation pending and enacted and affecting TMRS.

tracking_data.comments:
See PUB2000 for Government Relations
- General and PUB 2020 - Legislative
Information and Reports.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to professional licenses and certification obtained from government agencies in order to perform certain tasks: i.e., attorney, CPA, and other professional licenses.

Records related to individual employee Members, Retirees, Beneficiary Payees, and Alternate Payees, including account status, service credits, deposits, deductions, escheated property. Includes active and inactive members. Also includes processing of transactions for these individuals such as refunds, retirements and payment transactions. Excludes estimate records described in MBA2030.
Estimate records related to individual Members, Retirees, Beneficiary Payees and Alternate Payees, includes active and inactive Members.
Records related to the internal review of operations and administration as well as routine and requested reports.

tracking_data.comments:
See EXE1300 for Strategic Business
Planning Including Performance
Measures Documentation.

series_metadata.series_description: Records that document the assignment of service, retirement, and/or disability numbers to System members.
Listings and reports on member employees terminated from the System. Does not include terminated member file.

tracking_data.comments:
See MBA2020 for Member Employees -
General.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Payroll and Direct Deposit Elections
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to TMRS employees enrolled in direct deposit payroll plan. Includes direct deposit waiver form and pre-note report, as well as authorization for other deductions elected by the employee.
Records relating to the identification and reporting of hours worked. Including all time cards and timesheets submitted to payroll in order to document hours worked for a particular period.

tracking_data.comments:
These records are the backup
documents to PAY1200 which has a
retention period of CE+4.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting payroll accounting including input records, summary statements and history. Includes registers that provide detail of the payroll process, and employee saving deductions.

series_metadata.series_title: Texas Workforce Commission (TWC) Reports - Payroll Data
series_metadata.series_description: Records submitted to state unemployment divisions. Contains employment and wage information for employees.

Original artwork created by TMRS or external parties in the development of an advertising, marketing, education or public relations campaign. Includes background material, copy (drafts), photographs, photo negatives, prints, flats, layouts, displays, drawings, etc.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Successive and
substantive drafts of major publications
may be archival. Major is defined by
both the publication's authorship and
its impact on Texas and Texans.
Original artwork, including photo prints
and negatives that have significant
value as evidence of agency programs
as well as the potential for re-use, may
be archival.

series_metadata.series_description: Records pertaining to government relations on local, state, and/or national levels that reflect issues that have an impact on the System.

series_metadata.series_title: Government Relations - Legislative Information and Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting proposed and adopted legislation affecting TMRS. Includes drafts, analyses, and studies. Does not include legal consultation.

tracking_data.comments:
See LEG3080 for Legal Projects and
Analysis - Legislation.

series_metadata.series_description: News, press releases, marketing files and collateral, or any public relations files maintained or issued by TMRS. Includes print, electronic, audio, and audiovisual records.
Records documenting communication and correspondence with similar organizations and participation in industry and professional organizations and cooperative development of industry-wide standards.

One copy of each "State Publication" as defined on page xi of the State's Records Retention Schedule, except a publication that is subject to a different retention period in this schedule. For example, a Board meeting agenda (see EXE1020) also meets the definition, but it must be retained permanently.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Many state publications
must be submitted to the Texas State
Publications Depository Program,
TSLAC by law (Govt Code 441.101-
441.106). Most of TMRS' publications
are posted on its website which is part
of the TSLAC TRAIL program which at
least twice a year crawls and captures
the TMRS Website. TSLAC will retain a
copy of all state publications submitted
to it on a continuing basis, subject to
periodic evaluation to determine if the
publication merits further retention.
For additional info. and requirements
concerning state publications made
available to the public through the
Internet, consult the admin. rules of
the Texas State Publications Depository
Program of the TSLA Comm. (13 TAC
§§3.1-3.16).

series_metadata.series_title: Training and Development Program - Plan Members
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to TMRS efforts to provide training to cities and members regarding benefits, contributions, and services. Includes training materials and attendance lists.

series_metadata.series_title: Training and Development Program - Continuing Professional Education (CPE) Credits for Plan Members
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to TMRS efforts to provide training to cities and members regarding benefits, contributions, and services which result in awarding CPEs.

tracking_data.comments:
Retention period in compliance with
TAC Title 22, Section 523.143
(Sponsor's Record) last amended to be
effective 3-29-2017.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the requisition/authorization, invitations to bid or propose, bid specifications for procurement of goods and services. Includes successful and unsuccessful bids that met TMRS' bid specifications and were considered in the bid tabulation/evaluations.

tracking_data.comments:
Includes all bid documentation
associated with contracts regardless of
executed, renewed or amended date of
such contracts. Bid documentation
regarding Actuarial Audit Services are
kept for AC+10 since the contract is
only for 1 year and these services are
only requested every 10 years.

series_metadata.series_title: Purchasing and Requisition - Unsuccessful Bid Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Unsuccessful bids that do not meet agency submission requirements and are not included in bid evaluation process (e.g. withdrawn, missed submission deadline, incomplete submission, etc.)

series_metadata.series_title: Request for Information Regarding Supplier Candidates and Qualifications
series_metadata.series_description: Records that serve to identify and provide support for the official procurement supplier lists and for official TMRS or state vendor list. Includes records that document supplier/vendor interest and qualifications to provide goods and services.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: if the request for
information leads to request for
proposal or bid, the request for
information documentation should be
retained in accordance with one of the
PUR1000 codes.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to IRS 1099 tax reporting for TMRS vendors and contractors.

tracking_data.comments:
See TAX1020 for Federal 1099
Reporting - Plan Administration.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to IRS 1099-R tax reporting for System member refunds and retirements.

tracking_data.comments:
See TAX1000 for Federal 1099
Reporting - General.

series_metadata.series_title: US Federal and State Tax Withholding - General
series_metadata.series_description: Records supporting the taxes paid, withheld, and reported for TMRS employees. They also include rates of taxation, etc.

series_metadata.series_title: US Federal and State Tax Withholding - Plan Members
series_metadata.series_description: Records supporting the taxes paid, withheld, and reported for Members, Retirees, Beneficiaries and Alternate Payees. They also include rates of taxation, etc.
TMRS' copy of "Employees' Withholding Exemption Certificate."

Records of temporary usefulness that are not an integral part of a records series of an agency, that are not regularly filed within an agency’s recordkeeping system, and that are required only for a limited period of time for the completion of an action by an official or employee of the agency or in the preparation of an ongoing records series. Transitory records are not essential to the fulfillment of statutory obligations or to the documentation of agency functions. Some examples of transitory information, which can be in any medium (voice mail, fax, email, hard copy, etc.) are routine messages; telephone message notifications; internal meeting notices; routing slips; incoming letters or memoranda of transmittal that add nothing of substance to enclosures; and similar routine information used for communication, but not for the documentation, of a specific agency transaction.

tracking_data.comments:
Dispose of as soon as possible.
CAUTION: Records management
officers should use caution in assigning
this records series item number to
records of an agency to make certain
they are not part of another records
series listed in this schedule or, for
records series unique to an agency, are
not part of a records series that
documents the fulfillment of the
statutory obligations of the agency or
the documentation of its functions.
The disposal of transitory information
need not be documented through
destruction signoffs or in records
disposition logs ADM2000, but
agencies should establish procedures
governing disposal of these records as
part of its records management plan.
